hero.role: Software Engineer, Frontend Developer, and Community Leader
hero.description: I build modern, accessible web experiences that connect technology, inclusion, women's leadership, and Indigenous communities in Colombia.

about.title: More than code
about.description: My story connects software engineering, frontend development, community, and Wayuu identity.
about.imageAlt: Rina Plata participating in a technology community space
paragraphs: I am Rina Plata, a software engineer with experience in frontend development, web accessibility, and community leadership. I see technology as a tool for opening opportunities, telling stories, and creating more human-centered products.

I am passionate about building accessible, clear, and useful interfaces. I work with Angular, React, TypeScript, accessibility, and UX best practices so digital experiences work well for more people. I also incorporate artificial intelligence into my projects to improve efficiency and personalization, always with an ethical, user-centered approach.
I also lead and participate in communities where I speak about education, web accessibility, women's leadership, Indigenous identity, and social impact through technology.

experience.title: My Professional Journey
experience.description: Hands-on experience across interfaces, APIs, accessibility, and communities.

responsibilities: Build experiences focused on performance, accessibility, and usability.
Work remotely with product and technology teams.
achievements: Contributed to digital products in the energy sector.

responsibilities: Develop secure, scalable, high-quality web applications.
Work with .NET and Blazor on healthcare and insurance solutions.
Build interfaces and flows with attention to web accessibility.
achievements: Participated in critical products focused on security and scalability.
Integrated frontend and backend skills into real-world solutions.

responsibilities: Created innovative, accessible, and efficient solutions for different projects.
Built layouts, components, and service integrations.
achievements: Actively contributed to real web products for more than two years.
Strengthened experience in Angular, accessibility, and remote collaboration.

responsibilities: Tracked tasks and documentation in Asana.
Participated in interface updates and maintenance.
achievements: Built early experience in remote professional collaboration.
Used AngularJS in a real project context.

responsibilities: Managed social media moderation and supported course authors.
Monitored online courses and participated in live streams.
achievements: Strengthened community and educational communication processes.
Built early experience connecting education, technology, and people operations.

talks.title: Speaking on Technology, Community, and Inclusion
talks.description: Conferences, panels, interviews, and podcasts about frontend, accessibility, identity, and leadership.
talks.allTalksDescription: A complete overview of conferences, panels, podcasts, articles, and community events.

jsconf-wayuu.title: My Experience as a Wayuu Programmer in Technology
jsconf-wayuu.description: A talk about professional experience, Wayuu identity, and the participation of Indigenous communities in technology.

wtm-emancipation.title: Technology as a Tool for Women's Emancipation
wtm-emancipation.description: A lightning talk on how technology strengthens freedom, identity, and women's roles in society, presented with Miguel Teheran at Universidad EAFIT.

caribeconf-accessibility.title: Accessibility: Inclusion from Your Code
caribeconf-accessibility.description: A talk about intercultural, accessible, and inclusive technology, integrating Indigenous languages such as Wayuunaiki, WCAG standards, and tools like Playwright.

ciandt-ai-inclusion.title: Technology for Everyone: Rethinking Innovation and AI with Inclusion
ciandt-ai-inclusion.description: A talk about artificial intelligence, innovation, and inclusion to build technology that is more accessible and useful for different communities.

pioneras-learning.title: Developer Learning Tools
pioneras-learning.description: My first talk as a speaker at the launch of the Pioneras Cartagena chapter, with a panel about the role of women from Cartagena in technology.

we-can-code-it.title: We Can Code It!
we-can-code-it.description: A conversation about talent, history, and women's participation in technology with Daniela Gomez, Sandy Atencio, and Vrilly Castro.

datasoul-wayuu.title: Wayuu Programmer in the Tech Industry
datasoul-wayuu.description: An episode about professional experience, Wayuu identity, and the participation of Indigenous women in the technology industry.

devlokos-career.title: The Challenge of Starting in Software Development
devlokos-career.description: S2 Ep042 episode about the challenges, lessons, and experiences of starting a career in software development.

telerik-inspiring.title: Inspiring Women: Rina Plata
telerik-inspiring.description: An interview about Wayuu identity, a career in technology, communities, leadership, and lessons learned while building a STEM career.

pioneras-api-colombia.title: Discovering the Power of Open Data: Exploring API Colombia with React.js
pioneras-api-colombia.description: A talk about using open data and consuming public Colombian APIs to create frontend experiences with React.js.

kcd-diversity.title: Diversity and Inclusion in the STEAM Industry
kcd-diversity.description: A panel about diversity, inclusion, and representation in the STEAM industry with Marian Villa, Veronica Rodriguez, Kaky Rodriguez, and Mariana Ramirez.

tech-talk-code.title: Tech Talk: Women in Code
tech-talk-code.description: A live panel about women in technology and professional experiences in the industry with Valentina Pinzon, Caro Castaneda, and Carlos Alarcon.
tech-talk-code.alt: Tech Talk: Women in Code panel with speakers from the technology community

putumayo-ancestral.title: The Impact of Technology on Preserving Ancestral Knowledge
putumayo-ancestral.description: A talk at the Inspiration and Technology gathering about preserving ancestral knowledge through technology, held in the lab building at Instituto Tecnologico de Putumayo.

boyaconf-accessible-js.title: Programming to Include with JavaScript: Accessible Technology
boyaconf-accessible-js.description: A talk about creating accessible and inclusive web experiences with JavaScript, focused on WCAG standards and development best practices.

hackseiiis.title: HACKSEIIIS - TDEA's First Hackathon
hackseiiis.description: Leadership and organization of the first hackathon organized by students and faculty at Tecnologico de Antioquia. The event brought together different universities and demonstrated the impact of community collaboration, women's leadership, and technological innovation.
hackseiiis.alt: HACKSEIIIS organizing team, the first hackathon at Tecnologico de Antioquia

communities.title: Community Leadership and Learning Networks
communities.description: Spaces where I contribute through mentoring, organization, talks, and representation.

guardianes.description: An initiative that connects identity, memory, education, and technology to make Indigenous knowledge more visible.
guardianes.impact: Created learning and support spaces for Wayuu girls, boys, and communities in La Guajira.

api-colombia.description: An open source project that provides a free public REST API with no authentication required to query information about Colombia.
api-colombia.impact: Contributed to open access to data about departments, regions, tourism, culture, Native communities, airports, and more, supporting educational projects and digital products.

tech-community.description: A Colombian community that connects people, learning, and opportunities around technology.
tech-community.impact: Organized spaces to share knowledge, strengthen professional networks, and highlight tech talent.

pioneras-dev.description: A community that supports the growth of women in technology.
pioneras-dev.impact: Talks, mentoring, and support for women strengthening their professional paths.

women-techmakers.description: A global program that promotes visibility, community, and resources for women in technology.
women-techmakers.impact: Participated in conversations about women's leadership, inclusion, and tech community through 2025.

wids.description: A community focused on data, learning, and visibility for women in science and technology.
wids.impact: Represented WiDS as an Ambassador in Medellin through 2024, connecting education, technology, and opportunities for women.

projects.title: Digital Products with a Human Approach
projects.description: Frontend, accessibility, education, and social impact.

portfolio.name: Professional Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal website built to present experience, talks, communities, and featured projects.
portfolio.impact: Communicates a professional identity connected to technology, accessibility, and intercultural work.

communities.name: Technology for Communities
communities.description: Digital prototypes and content for education, community, and social impact.
communities.impact: Brings technology tools into conversations about territory, education, and identity.

achievements.title: Recognition and Milestones
achievements.description: Milestones that reflect learning, representation, and contribution.

featured.title: Outstanding Woman in Technology
featured.description: Recognition awarded by Tecnologico de Antioquia Institucion Universitaria for contributions to technology, community leadership, WiDS, Women Techmakers, and Guardianes Ancestrales.
featured.alt: Rina Plata holding the Outstanding Woman in Technology recognition awarded by Tecnologico de Antioquia

jsconf.description: Talk about her experience as a Wayuu developer in the technology industry.

education.title: Software Engineering Education

languages.title: Languages and Identity
languages.description: Native Spanish and Wayuunaiki speaker, with A2 English proficiency.
